content: The OpenClaw ACP agent harness framework’s 2026 focus on long-term operational reliability for autonomous agents can be augmented by embedding a 2025 ICM curiosity mechanism that gates intrinsic exploration only against the harness’s pre-defined operational reliability constraints. This creates a system where autonomous agents explore novel environments and tasks only when their core long-term operational commitments remain unthreatened.
source_topics: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
trigger_topic: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
